## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Rapyd and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, AI-assisted article generation, and performance tracking.](https://fathom.video/share/ydDs3rBjpsGzZLbsBCDfX6kArpF4tZEV?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX demonstrated their AI-assisted content creation process using AirOps, Claude, and other tools](https://fathom.video/share/ydDs3rBjpsGzZLbsBCDfX6kArpF4tZEV?tab=summary&timestamp=16.0)
  - [Rapyd shared key metrics they track for content performance, including conversions and traffic](https://fathom.video/share/ydDs3rBjpsGzZLbsBCDfX6kArpF4tZEV?tab=summary&timestamp=98.0)
  - [Both teams aligned on developing KPIs and a dashboard to measure content effectiveness](https://fathom.video/share/ydDs3rBjpsGzZLbsBCDfX6kArpF4tZEV?tab=summary&timestamp=787.0)
  - [Plans made to ramp up content production and begin publishing next week](https://fathom.video/share/ydDs3rBjpsGzZLbsBCDfX6kArpF4tZEV?tab=summary&timestamp=1830.0)

## Topics

### AI-Assisted Content Creation Process

  - [AirOps used for article generation, with inputs including keyword, company context, and polishing instructions](https://fathom.video/share/ydDs3rBjpsGzZLbsBCDfX6kArpF4tZEV?tab=summary&timestamp=50.0)
  - [Claude AI utilized for long-form content writing, producing longer articles than ChatGPT](https://fathom.video/share/ydDs3rBjpsGzZLbsBCDfX6kArpF4tZEV?tab=summary&timestamp=447.0)
  - [Human review/editing occurs at multiple stages, including outline creation and post-processing](https://fathom.video/share/ydDs3rBjpsGzZLbsBCDfX6kArpF4tZEV?tab=summary&timestamp=433.0)
  - [Internal linking aided by Aerofs tool, using Rapyd's sitemap to find relevant content](https://fathom.video/share/ydDs3rBjpsGzZLbsBCDfX6kArpF4tZEV?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)

### Content Performance Metrics

  - [Mark (Rapyd) shared key HubSpot dashboard metrics:](https://fathom.video/share/ydDs3rBjpsGzZLbsBCDfX6kArpF4tZEV?tab=summary&timestamp=1035.0)
      - [Contacts created (especially from contact forms and organic search)](https://fathom.video/share/ydDs3rBjpsGzZLbsBCDfX6kArpF4tZEV?tab=summary&timestamp=1035.0)
      - [Overall organic search traffic](https://fathom.video/share/ydDs3rBjpsGzZLbsBCDfX6kArpF4tZEV?tab=summary&timestamp=1096.0)
      - [Blog posts leading to conversions](https://fathom.video/share/ydDs3rBjpsGzZLbsBCDfX6kArpF4tZEV?tab=summary&timestamp=1121.0)
      - [Gated content downloads and associated funnel progression](https://fathom.video/share/ydDs3rBjpsGzZLbsBCDfX6kArpF4tZEV?tab=summary&timestamp=1190.0)
  - [GrowthX to align their tracking with Rapyd's existing metrics](https://fathom.video/share/ydDs3rBjpsGzZLbsBCDfX6kArpF4tZEV?tab=summary&timestamp=1297.0)
  - [Plans to eventually extend tracking further down the funnel, potentially involving Rapyd's marketing operations team](https://fathom.video/share/ydDs3rBjpsGzZLbsBCDfX6kArpF4tZEV?tab=summary&timestamp=1401.0)

### KPI Development and Reporting

  - [Jakub (GrowthX) proposed a phased approach to KPIs:](https://fathom.video/share/ydDs3rBjpsGzZLbsBCDfX6kArpF4tZEV?tab=summary&timestamp=1569.0)
      - [Initial focus on operational metrics (e.g., publishing cadence)](https://fathom.video/share/ydDs3rBjpsGzZLbsBCDfX6kArpF4tZEV?tab=summary&timestamp=1574.0)
      - [Progress to keyword growth and impression growth](https://fathom.video/share/ydDs3rBjpsGzZLbsBCDfX6kArpF4tZEV?tab=summary&timestamp=1584.0)
      - [Eventually track traffic growth and conversions](https://fathom.video/share/ydDs3rBjpsGzZLbsBCDfX6kArpF4tZEV?tab=summary&timestamp=1604.0)
  - [Discussion of potential "North Star" metrics to gauge overall program success](https://fathom.video/share/ydDs3rBjpsGzZLbsBCDfX6kArpF4tZEV?tab=summary&timestamp=1635.0)
  - [GrowthX to set up a Looker Studio report for weekly performance tracking](https://fathom.video/share/ydDs3rBjpsGzZLbsBCDfX6kArpF4tZEV?tab=summary&timestamp=823.0)

### Content Strategy and Next Steps

  - [Mark to review and potentially update AI context and polishing instructions](https://fathom.video/share/ydDs3rBjpsGzZLbsBCDfX6kArpF4tZEV?tab=summary&timestamp=114.0)
  - [GrowthX to produce 5 more articles next week, gradually ramping up production](https://fathom.video/share/ydDs3rBjpsGzZLbsBCDfX6kArpF4tZEV?tab=summary&timestamp=1826.0)
  - [Begin publishing content next week to start tracking impressions and clicks](https://fathom.video/share/ydDs3rBjpsGzZLbsBCDfX6kArpF4tZEV?tab=summary&timestamp=1830.0)
  - [Future considerations for targeting channel partners and expanding content focus](https://fathom.video/share/ydDs3rBjpsGzZLbsBCDfX6kArpF4tZEV?tab=summary&timestamp=1663.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Mark to review and update AI context and polishing instructions](https://fathom.video/share/ydDs3rBjpsGzZLbsBCDfX6kArpF4tZEV?tab=summary&timestamp=114.0)
  - [Aida to share AirOps workflow details with Mark for review](https://fathom.video/share/ydDs3rBjpsGzZLbsBCDfX6kArpF4tZEV?tab=summary&timestamp=145.0)
  - [GrowthX to set up Looker Studio report for performance tracking](https://fathom.video/share/ydDs3rBjpsGzZLbsBCDfX6kArpF4tZEV?tab=summary&timestamp=823.0)
  - [Mark to request HubSpot admin team add GrowthX to vendor list for dashboard access](https://fathom.video/share/ydDs3rBjpsGzZLbsBCDfX6kArpF4tZEV?tab=summary&timestamp=1727.0)
  - [GrowthX to produce and prepare 5 new articles for review next week](https://fathom.video/share/ydDs3rBjpsGzZLbsBCDfX6kArpF4tZEV?tab=summary&timestamp=1822.0)
  - [Begin publishing content to enable performance tracking](https://fathom.video/share/ydDs3rBjpsGzZLbsBCDfX6kArpF4tZEV?tab=summary&timestamp=1830.0)
